welcome: Welcome to Game Buddy. Pick a profile, choose a game, and start a match. Hover on desktop or long-press on mobile to see what buttons do.
shareCode: Share-code multiplayer is asynchronous. After your turn, create a new code and send it to the next player.
wagers: Optional wagers use Buddy Bucks. Standard casino-style games use them by default.
builder: The custom tabletop builder lets you save board setups, place built-in pieces, and upload custom piece art. Rules text is saved with your custom table.
